title: [InstCombine] Fix the correctness of missing check reassoc attribute
summary:
The developers generalized by identifying a core property: reassociation safety requires all operand instructions (FNeg, FAdd, FSub, FMul, FDiv, FRem) to also have the `reassoc` flag, not just the current FMul. They added `hasAllowReassocOfAllOperand()` to check this recursively, ensuring the entire expression tree respects reassociation constraints.

This transforms a single-case fix into a robust, reusable predicate that prevents unsafe reassociation across nested operations. The approach isolates the safety check into a well-defined method, making it easy to apply to other reassociation-based optimizations (like FAdd, FDiv) by simply invoking this helper. It ensures correctness while enabling broader pattern matching, as seen in the expanded test suite covering exp, pow, sqrt, and common factor elimination.
